zh.lifeSummary: 當John Kinkead於1721年出生時，他的父親John Kincaid26歲，母親Anna Elizabeth McClure20歲。他於1740年與Elizabeth Jordan在美國賓夕法尼亞州波藍德卡萊爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1772年8月4日在美國賓夕法尼亞州波藍德卡萊爾享年51歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州波藍德卡萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Kinkead于1721年出生时，他的父亲John Kincaid26岁，母亲Anna Elizabeth McClure20岁。他于1740年与Elizabeth Jordan在美国宾夕法尼亚州波藍德卡萊爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1772年8月4日在美国宾夕法尼亚州波藍德卡萊爾享年51岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州波藍德卡萊爾。

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1750: Cumberland, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Pennsylvania, United States

The French-born fur trader James Le Tort may have built a cabin in the area as early as 1720. During the colonial era, Scots-Irish settlers began to settle in the Cumberland Valley beginning in the early 1730s. The settlement of Carlisle, at the intersection of several Indigenous trails, was designated by the Pennsylvania assembly and the Penn family in 1751 as the seat of Cumberland County (named for the county of the same name in England). American engineer John Armstrong Sr., a surveyor for the Penn family, laid the plan for the settlement of Carlisle in 1751. Armstrong Sr. settled there and fathered John Armstrong Jr. in 1758. They named the settlement after its sister town of the same name in Cumberland, England, and even designed its former jailhouse (which now serve as general government offices in the county) to resemble the Carlisle Citadel.

en.lifeSummary: When John Kinkead was born in 1721, his father, John Kincaid, was 26 and his mother, Anna Elizabeth McClure, was 20. He married Elizabeth Jordan in 1740, in Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 August 1772, in Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 51, and was buried in Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Kinkead est né en 1721, son père, John Kincaid, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anna Elizabeth McClure, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Jordan en 1740, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1772, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Kinkead 1721 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Kincaid 26 und seine Mutter Anna Elizabeth McClure 20. Er hat 1740 in Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Elizabeth Jordan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1772 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Carlisle, Cumberland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Kinkeadが1721年に生まれた時，父John Kincaidは26歳，母Anna Elizabeth McClureは20歳であった。1740年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州クウンバーランドカーリスルでElizabeth Jordanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1772年8月4日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州クウンバーランドカーリスルで51歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州クウンバーランドカーリスルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Kinkead(이)가 1721년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Kincaid(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Elizabeth McClure(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1740년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 Elizabeth Jordan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1772년 8월 4일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Jordan em 1740, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1772, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Carlisle, Cumberland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Kinkead родился в 1721 г., его отцу по имени John Kincaid было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Elizabeth McClure, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Jordan в 1740 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1772 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.
